location.office_time_required: 3 days per week (Tuesdays, Thursdays, and one flex day); up to 4 weeks remote per year

level_signals: 5-8 years of experience in growth marketing or partnerships strategy mentioned in role description
Comp range $148K-$203.5K base in New York consistent with Senior IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4+ years of experience in Growth Marketing or Partnerships, with a focus on acquisition-driven partnerships in B2B or B2C (e.g., affiliates, influencers, referrals, sponsorships).
must_haves.qualifier: acquisition-driven partnerships in B2B or B2C

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Deep understanding of affiliate marketing strategies, including experience with networks, publishers, influencers, and performance-based partnerships; experience managing affiliate networks (e.g., Impact, PartnerStack, CJ, Rakuten, Awin, ShareASale) and developing direct partnerships.
Proven experience managing external agencies or vendors, including setting deliverables and holding partners accountable to performance targets
Proven ability to scale affiliate programs within ROI guardrails, optimize partner performance, and manage both long-tail and strategic partnerships with the tenacity to overcome obstacles to growth.
Hands-on experience in testing and launching new growth channels, including referral programs, influencer partnerships, and non-traditional acquisition channels.
Ability to identify and cultivate high-value third-party partnerships, balancing short-term testing with long-term scalability and opportunity sizing.
Some experience structuring or negotiating partnership or business development deals
Excellent analytical, organizational, and written/verbal communication skills; Can effectively communicate through data using clear and concise summary
Strong project management and execution skills, able to drive multiple initiatives simultaneously in a fast-paced environment.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: familiar with SQL or willingness to learn a plus.

scope.surface: Affiliate and partnerships-driven retailer acquisition channel; broader partnerships ecosystem including influencer, referral, blog, sponsorships, trade shows
scope.business_model: B2B marketplace / wholesale platform (Faire connects independent retailers with brands/suppliers)
primary_metrics_inferred: GMV and revenue growth from affiliate channel
Affiliate channel KPIs and attribution accuracy
core_responsibilities: Own and optimize affiliate program end-to-end to maximize retailer acquisition growth while maintaining efficient acquisition costs
Serve as primary point of contact for affiliate agency; oversee program execution and hold agency accountable to performance targets
Build ROI case for and test new acquisition channels within the partnerships ecosystem
Analyze third-party partner ecosystem and invest in innovative BD partnership models
Analyze and own accountability for campaign and channel performance
Collaborate cross-functionally with Growth Marketing, Analytics, BD, and Product teams
Support SEO/AEO initiatives where partnerships can contribute to organic discovery

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as part of compensation package (form unspecified)

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($148K-$203.5K base in New York)
Equity mentioned as part of compensation
Clear ownership area and metrics (retailer acquisitions, GMV, ROI)
Backed by top-tier investors (Y Combinator, Sequoia, Founders Fund, etc.)
Hybrid flexibility including up to 4 weeks remote per year
red_flags: JD body mentions '5-8 years of experience' in role description but qualifications section states '4+ years' — creates ambiguity on true minimum requirement
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed in JD
Compensation range is New York-specific; no indication of pay in other locations or whether other locations are eligible
Hybrid requirement of 3 days/week in office is relatively demanding

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Senior', comp range, and responsibilities)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed as metrics)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from salary being New York-specific)
ambiguities: Years of experience: role description states '5-8 years of experience in growth marketing or partnerships strategy' but the qualifications section lists '4+ years'. Both are noted; severity for the years requirement is set to hard based on the explicit qualifications section (4+), with the 5-8 year range used as a seniority signal.
New Channel Development bullet in responsibilities is not formatted as a dash-prefixed bullet like the others — likely a formatting artifact, treated as equivalent in scope.

Role location is ambiguous: compensation is stated for New York only, but the JD does not explicitly confirm the role is New York-only. Other Faire offices (San Francisco, Toronto, London) exist. Treated as New York-primary given salary disclosure.
